content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic motivation mechanisms (like ICM and RND from Topic A's autonomous agent framework) can be re-purposed as a dynamic pruning and retrieval gating system for cutting-edge 2024-2025 active learning agent memory, where the agent prioritizes storing and recalling memory traces that trigger unresolved intrinsic curiosity instead of just reward-linked or task-relevant traces. This creates a self-improving memory loop that reduces active learning annotation burden by automatically focusing data collection on high-uncertainty, high-knowledge-gain memory content.
